locations.name: Phoenix, Arizona
locations.expected_signal: high drought sensitivity and elevated regional water stress
locations.notes: Use for desert-urban water-intelligence and AI infrastructure siting context.

locations.name: Tucson, Arizona
locations.expected_signal: drought and groundwater pressure in a lower-density desert city
locations.notes: Useful for utility and public-sector benchmark comparisons.

locations.name: Flint, Michigan
locations.expected_signal: quality and trust-oriented benchmark, not drought-led
locations.notes: Use for public-data transparency and quality-trust use cases.

locations.name: Jackson, Mississippi
locations.expected_signal: utility and resilience benchmark rather than extreme basin scarcity
locations.notes: Useful for institutional water-system and resilience narratives.

locations.name: New York, New York
locations.expected_signal: comparatively lower drought signal and stronger monitoring density
locations.notes: Use as a dense, better-instrumented urban comparison point.

locations.name: Lake Mead, Nevada
locations.notes: Pairs well with Observatory imagery and regional drought storytelling.
